parts.label: Header (Right Bank)
parts.function: Tubular header collecting exhaust from the three right-bank cylinders into a single collector.

parts.label: Header (Left Bank)
parts.function: Tubular header collecting exhaust from the three left-bank cylinders into a single collector.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Gasket (Right)
parts.function: Metal-elastomer gasket sealing the right-bank exhaust manifold-to-cylinder-head joint against combustion gas leakage.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Gasket (Left)
parts.function: Metal-elastomer gasket sealing the left-bank exhaust manifold-to-cylinder-head joint against combustion gas leakage.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Studs & Nuts (Right, x3)
parts.function: M8 threaded studs pressed into the right cylinder head with self-locking nuts that clamp the exhaust manifold flange.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Studs & Nuts (Left, x3)
parts.function: M8 threaded studs pressed into the left cylinder head with self-locking nuts that clamp the exhaust manifold flange.

parts.label: Flex Pipe / Bellows (Right)
parts.function: Corrugated stainless-steel flexible section between the right manifold collector and the primary cat, absorbing engine movement and thermal expansion.

parts.label: Flex Pipe / Bellows (Left)
parts.function: Corrugated stainless-steel flexible section between the left manifold collector and the primary cat, absorbing engine movement and thermal expansion.

parts.label: Catalytic Converter (Right)
parts.function: Converts harmful right-bank exhaust gases into less-toxic emissions over a ceramic catalyst.

parts.label: Catalytic Converter (Left)
parts.function: Converts harmful left-bank exhaust gases into less-toxic emissions over a ceramic catalyst.

parts.label: Heat Shield — Primary Cat (Right)
parts.function: Stamped aluminium heat shield wrapped around the right primary catalytic converter to protect the mid-engine bay components from radiant heat.

parts.label: Heat Shield — Primary Cat (Left)
parts.function: Stamped aluminium heat shield wrapped around the left primary catalytic converter to protect the mid-engine bay components from radiant heat.

parts.label: Heat Shield — Underbody / Mid-Section
parts.function: Large underbody heat shield spanning the mid-engine section, critical on the Boxster mid-engine layout to protect fuel lines, wiring, and the centre tunnel from exhaust heat.

parts.label: Pre-Cat Oxygen Sensor (Right, Upstream)
parts.function: Wideband lambda sensor mounted upstream of the right primary catalytic converter to provide closed-loop fuelling feedback to the DME.

parts.label: Pre-Cat Oxygen Sensor (Left, Upstream)
parts.function: Wideband lambda sensor mounted upstream of the left primary catalytic converter to provide closed-loop fuelling feedback to the DME.

parts.label: Post-Cat Oxygen Sensor (Right, Downstream)
parts.function: Downstream oxygen sensor on the right bank that monitors catalytic converter efficiency and reports degradation to the DME.

parts.label: Post-Cat Oxygen Sensor (Left, Downstream)
parts.function: Downstream oxygen sensor on the left bank that monitors catalytic converter efficiency and reports degradation to the DME.

parts.label: Mid-Pipe / X-Pipe
parts.function: Crossover pipe connecting both exhaust banks downstream of the primary catalytic converters to balance exhaust pulses.

parts.label: Secondary Catalytic Converters (x2)
parts.function: Underfloor secondary catalysts providing additional emissions treatment after the close-coupled primary converters.

parts.label: Heat Shield — Mid-Pipe
parts.function: Wraparound heat shield protecting the underbody and luggage compartment floor from the radiant heat of the mid-pipe / X-pipe section.

parts.label: Centre Section Resonator
parts.function: Tuned resonator canister in the centre section that attenuates specific exhaust frequencies before the gases reach the rear mufflers.

parts.label: Muffler Inlet Gasket (Right)
parts.function: Flat metal gasket sealing the inlet flange joint between the connecting pipe and the right rear muffler.

parts.label: Muffler Inlet Gasket (Left)
parts.function: Flat metal gasket sealing the inlet flange joint between the connecting pipe and the left rear muffler.

parts.label: Muffler (Right)
parts.function: Rear silencer on the right side that attenuates exhaust noise before the tailpipes.

parts.label: Muffler (Left)
parts.function: Rear silencer on the left side that attenuates exhaust noise before the tailpipes.

parts.label: PSE Sport Exhaust Bypass Valve
parts.function: Vacuum-actuated bypass valve integrated into the rear muffler assembly that opens an alternative exhaust path for a louder, sportier exhaust note.

parts.label: PSE Valve Actuator (Vacuum Unit)
parts.function: Pneumatic actuator canister that translates intake-manifold vacuum into mechanical displacement to open and close the PSE bypass valve flap.

parts.label: Tailpipe Tip (Right)
parts.function: Polished right-side tailpipe tip where exhaust exits the system.

parts.label: Tailpipe Tip (Left)
parts.function: Polished left-side tailpipe tip where exhaust exits the system.

parts.label: Exhaust Hanger (Right)
parts.function: Rubber hanger that suspends the right side of the exhaust from the body.

parts.label: Exhaust Hanger (Left)
parts.function: Rubber hanger that suspends the left side of the exhaust from the body.

parts.label: PSE Vacuum Line
parts.function: Vacuum supply line that routes actuating vacuum from the intake manifold to the PSE bypass valve actuator.

parts.label: Exhaust Pipe Clamp
parts.function: Band clamp that secures pipe-to-pipe joints in the exhaust system, preventing leaks and relative movement.

parts.label: Exhaust Clamping Sleeve
parts.function: Slip-on clamping sleeve used to join exhaust pipe sections at intermediate connections.

parts.label: Lambda Probe Holder
parts.function: Bracket that supports and positions the lambda probe wiring harness along the exhaust system routing.

parts.label: Exhaust Silencer Bracket (PSE)
parts.function: Steel mounting bracket that attaches the rear silencer to the body structure on PSE-equipped vehicles.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Bracket
parts.function: Support bracket that braces the exhaust manifold against vibration and thermal movement.
